name: frontend-law-auditor
description: Human-centered frontend quality gate and theory-based audit skill for measurable UX diagnostics and remediation planning.

interface.shortDescription: Measure frontend UX quality against human-centered design laws
interface.longDescription: Portable frontend UX auditing skill with fast release gates, theory-grounded scoring, and actionable remediation output for Codex-compatible runtimes.
defaultPrompt: Audit this frontend flow against Fitts, Hick, Gestalt, Jakob, Miller, and related UX laws.
Create a measurable release gate for this onboarding or checkout flow.
